summary: Invoice & Payment Instructions Feature Testing - 21 backend tests passed, UI verified for Doula and Midwife roles. Fixed critical bug in Midwife invoice creation (was querying wrong collection). Mom invoices API works via backend tests.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Was querying db.midwife_clients instead of db.clients for MIDWIFE clients
Was querying both db.clients and non-existent db.midwife_clients

issues: Invoices tab not visible on dashboard - need to scroll or access via direct URL. Tab bar has too many items (9 tabs) causing overflow

action_items: Consider reducing Midwife tab bar items or implementing scrollable tabs for better UX
Mom test user is stuck on onboarding - consider completing profile for better testing or using a different test mom account with completed profile
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py lines 3934-3936 - Midwife invoice creation was using db.midwife_clients (non-existent) instead of db.clients with provider_type=MIDWIFE filter
FIXED: server.py lines 4002 - Midwife invoice send notification was using wrong collection
FIXED: server.py lines 4130-4140 - Mom invoices was querying db.midwife_clients which doesn't exist - consolidated to just db.clients
seed_data_creation: Test invoices created via backend tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice feature is working. Backend APIs all pass. Doula and Midwife invoices UI verified. Mom invoices API works but UI testing blocked by onboarding flow. Midwife tab bar has 9 items - consider UX improvement.
